artifactImportMap.description: Corpus document metadata (title, date, author, source URL) for the three-tier corpus (core, validation, reference sets)
artifactImportMap.notes: Imported via PPW corpus registry entries. Core (48 docs, #195), validation (75-100 docs, #196), reference (#197).

artifactImportMap.description: Raw text files for Lincoln v4 core corpus additions
artifactImportMap.notes: Lincoln's own writings (1838-1865) are public domain. Third-party texts require rights review before import.

artifactImportMap.description: Passage records (segmented passages with stable sentence IDs)
artifactImportMap.notes: Requires PPW passage schema validation. Import during Milestone 16.

artifactImportMap.description: Cluster profiles (metaphor cluster annotation outputs from Stage 4A)
artifactImportMap.notes: Represent as analysis artifacts in Milestone 16.
Child-repo annotation artifacts; referenced by provenance link from PPW claims. Not copied into PPW.

artifactImportMap.description: Stage 4H/4J records (human coding and adjudication decisions)
artifactImportMap.notes: Reliability artifacts; inform PPW review-gate design but do not become PPW data.
Methodology context; referenced from PPW method note (PPW #146). Not copied.
